result.markdown:
--- title: "Redlining Map" subtitle: "Cloud-native vector data with duckdbfs and mapgl" --- Load libraries ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(duckdbfs) library(dplyr) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'dplyr' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': filter, lag ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:base': intersect, setdiff, setequal, union ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(jsonlite) library(sf) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Linking to GEOS 3.12.1, GDAL 3.8.4, PROJ 9.4.0; sf_use_s2() is TRUE ``` ::: ::: Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} holc <- open_dataset( "https://data.source.coop/cboettig/mappinginequality/mappinginequality.parquet" ) datacenters <- "https://s3-west.nrp-nautilus.io/public-datacenters/data_centers.geojson" ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} holc <- holc |> mutate(area_ha = sql("ROUND(ST_Area_Spheroid(ST_FlipCoordinates(geom)) / 10000.0, 2)")) holc |> select(-geom_bbox) |> write_geo("holc.geojson") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] 10154 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(mapgl) m <- maplibre( center = c(-118.35, 34.05), zoom = 8 ) |> add_source( id = "holc", data = "https://espm-288.github.io/spatial-cboettig/holc.geojson" ) |> add_fill_layer( id = "redlining", source = "holc", fill_color = match_expr( column = "grade", values = c("A", "B", "C", "D"), stops = c("#76a865", "#7cb5bd", "#ffff00", "#d9838d") ), fill_opacity = 0.65, tooltip = "area_ha" ) m ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::
